message:
test(engine): expand integration tests for ambient authority, array fast lane, and declassification pipeline

Follow-up integration tests for the previous session's core module
hardening commits, covering edge cases and verifying fix correctness.

Ambient authority (101 new lines):
- detects_file_open_pattern / detects_file_create_pattern: verify
  File:: usage triggers file_open forbidden pattern finding
- detects_open_options_pattern: verify OpenOptions:: usage triggers
  open_options forbidden pattern finding
- Category assertion tests confirming FileSystem category on both
  new patterns
- Suggestion text tests verifying capability-mediated alternative text

Array fast lane double-deopt guard (242 new lines):
- test_double_deopt_on_lane_descriptor_is_idempotent: second deopt on
  an already-deoptimized lane produces no additional deopt record
- test_double_deopt_with_different_reasons_still_idempotent: different
  DeoptReason on inactive lane is still a no-op
- test_deopt_reopt_deopt_creates_two_records: reopt re-enables the
  guard, confirming subsequent deopt produces a second record
- Engine-level tests verifying deopt_log does not grow from transitions
  on already-deoptimized lanes

Declassification pipeline receipt signing order (162 new lines):
- receipt_is_signed_before_counter_mutation: verify receipt exists and
  counters are correct for the allow path
- receipt_is_signed_before_counter_mutation_deny_path: same for deny
- stats_at_filters_expired_emergency_grants: verify stats_at boundary
  behavior for emergency grant expiry
- Multiple additional tests exercising the latest_timestamp_ms tracking
  and failed-signing-does-not-advance-stats paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
